title: July 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 5''' is the 186th day of the year (187th in leap years), with 179 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[William Hootkins]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Pablo Helman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Ronald D. Moore]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Jamie Elman]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 22|''Star Wars Weekly'' 22]] published.
*[[1989]] – [[Claude Woolman]] dies.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Dark Horse Twenty Years]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – The trailer for {{Film|I}} airs on YouTube.
*2012 – The trailer for {{Film|III}} airs on YouTube.
*2012 – The original trailer for {{Film|IV}} airs on YouTube.
*2012 – The original trailer for {{Film|V}} airs on YouTube.
*2012 – The original trailer for {{Film|VI}} airs on YouTube.
*[[2013]] – Part 2 of ''[[The Droids Re-Animated]]'' published on the [[StarWars.com]] Blogs.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Darth Vader, Rebel Hunter!]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars Rebels: Deadly Battles]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – "[[Ewok Escape]]" airs on YouTube.
*2017 – [[Rogue One Adaptation 4|''Rogue One Adaptation'' 4]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars (2015) 33|''Star Wars'' (2015) 33]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 33|''Star Wars Rebels Magazine 33]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game 30th Anniversary Edition|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'' 30th Anniversary Edition]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Ewoks vs. The Empire - Small but Mighty]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 36|''Star Wars'' (2020) 36]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 9|''Yoda'' 9]] published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Show]]'' episode thirteen is released.
*[[2024]] – "[[Nubs Gardens]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
